_comment: Manual and deep-research backbone events for polymythcalendar. These records are merged with harvested records by scripts/upsert-manual-calendar-events.js.

_example_schema.source_id: MUST match a source id in scripts/sources.json
_example_schema.date: ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset. Example: 2026-06-15T18:00:00-04:00
_example_schema.title: Event title in front-facing plain language. Example: Annette Baier Memorial Lecture on Humean Sentimentalism
_example_schema.venue: Full venue with address if useful. Example: Jackman Humanities Building, 170 St. George St., Toronto
_example_schema.type: One of: lecture, reading, panel, screening, artist-talk, scholar-talk, philosophy-cafe, gathering, other
_example_schema.speaker_or_director: Optional. Name of the speaker, author, or director.
_example_schema.source_url: Optional. URL to the original event listing.
_example_schema.attendance_confirmed: Optional boolean. For screenings, true means filmmaker is present for Q and A.
_example_schema.description: Optional. Brief description shown in the RSS feed item body.
